hero_description: Full Stack Developer with expertise in .NET Core, Angular, Node.js, and MongoDB. Specialized in building scalable architectures, microservices, and cloud-native applications.
about_description: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer with expertise in building scalable, high-performance applications. Graduate of ITI Professional Program with specialization in .NET Full Stack Development and Software Architecture.

info_value_education:

service_fullstack_desc: End-to-end web applications with .NET Core, Angular, Node.js, MongoDB, and Clean Architecture.
service_microservices_desc: Design and implementation of scalable microservices with RabbitMQ, gRPC, and Docker.
service_architecture_desc: CQRS, Clean Architecture, Design Patterns, and SOLID principles implementation.
service_database_desc: SQL Server, MongoDB, Entity Framework Core, and database optimization.
service_devops_desc: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud deployment strategies.
service_crm_desc: Microsoft Dynamics 365, Power BI, and data visualization solutions.
project_dms_desc: Scalable architecture for medical system supporting 500k users with microservices, RabbitMQ, and Kubernetes.
project_pointpay_desc: E-commerce loyalty system with CQRS, Mediator pattern, and Clean Architecture.
project_rabbitmq_desc: Complete RabbitMQ implementation with Direct, Topic, Fanout, and Header exchanges.
project_cqrs_desc: Complete CQRS pattern with Mediator, separated read/write models, and performance optimization.
project_clean_desc: Enterprise-grade Clean Architecture template with separation of concerns and dependency inversion.
project_testing_desc: Comprehensive unit testing with MSTest, Assert, StringAssert, and CollectionAssert.
project_signalr_desc: Real-time applications with SignalR including chat and e-commerce notifications.
project_ecommerce_desc: Full e-commerce platform with real-time updates and notifications using SignalR.

timeline_future_desc: B2 English | Looking for Full Stack Roles | Continuous Learning
timeline_future_long: Actively seeking Full Stack Developer positions where I can leverage my skills in .NET Core, Angular, and cloud technologies. Open to remote and on-site opportunities.
timeline_medical_desc: EHR | Telemedicine | RBAC | Real-time Notifications | Scalable Architecture
timeline_medical_long: Developed and maintained a secure medical platform providing appointment scheduling, Electronic Health Records (EHR), telemedicine, and clinic management. Worked on both frontend and backend to deliver scalable, high-performance solutions with strong focus on data security and healthcare compliance.
timeline_medical_achievement_1: Delivered a functional MVP within a short timeline
timeline_medical_achievement_3: Implemented RBAC and encrypted data storage
timeline_saudi_desc: Mobile-friendly landing page design and development
timeline_saudi_long: Designed and developed a mobile-friendly landing page for a Saudi social media services company using HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, and Tailwind CSS. Focused on clear content structure, reusable components, and performance optimization.
timeline_event_desc: Venue Booking | Budget Tracking | Real-time Updates
timeline_event_long: Designed and developed a complete website for event organization with full stack technologies. Implemented booking features, including venue availability management and budget tracking.
timeline_pointpay_desc: CQRS | Mediator | Clean Architecture | Customer loyalty system
timeline_pointpay_long: Designed and developed a customer loyalty system where users earn points through purchases and recycling initiatives, with the option to donate points to charities.
timeline_pointpay_achievement_1: Applied CQRS, Mediator, Unit of Work patterns
timeline_pointpay_achievement_2: Clean Architecture with Entity Framework Core
timeline_iti_long: Intensive 9-month professional program specializing in BI-infused CRM development. Gained hands-on experience with Microsoft Dynamics 365, Power BI, and modern software development practices.
timeline_study_desc: Intensive preparation for ITI admission | .NET Core | Angular | DSA
timeline_study_long: Focused self-study period to prepare for ITI admission exams and technical interviews. Covered advanced .NET Core concepts, Angular framework, data structures, and algorithms.
timeline_military_long: Completed mandatory military service in Egypt. Developed discipline, teamwork, and leadership skills in a structured environment.
timeline_personal_desc: Enhancing .NET Core, Angular, and Data Structures knowledge
timeline_personal_long: Focused on building personal projects to enhance full-stack development skills. Worked on multiple projects including e-commerce platforms, recipe apps, and UI clones to strengthen practical knowledge.
timeline_hiero_desc: AI-powered translation of Ancient Egyptian Hieroglyphics | Grade: Excellent (A)
timeline_hiero_long: Built a mobile app that translates hieroglyphic texts into modern languages using Machine Learning and Natural Language Processing. Contributed to both frontend and backend using Flutter, Dart, and Firebase.
timeline_university_desc: Luxor University | Graduated with Distinction (GPA: 2.79, B-)
timeline_university_long: Completed Bachelor's degree in Computer Science from Faculty of Computing and Informatics, Luxor University. Graduated with Distinction, specializing in software development and algorithms.
